summary: The CI prettier check failed because one or more files are not formatted according to Prettier. The job reports a specific file that needs formatting.
root_cause: Prettier check failed: packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js is not formatted (prettier check exited non-zero).

evidence.quote: This project uses prettier to format all JavaScript code.
evidence.reason: Indicates the repository enforces Prettier formatting as part of the check.

evidence.quote: Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:
evidence.reason: Shows the required remediation action and that files listed below are unformatted.
Specifically lists the file that failed the prettier check.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: Shows the prettier-check command exited with a non-zero status, causing the job to fail.

suggested_fix: Run the repository formatting script locally and commit the changes: run yarn prettier-all, verify the listed file(s) are updated, add those changes to your commit, and push to re-run CI.
